text: “Local authorities” means the legislative body of every county or municipality having authority to adopt local police regulations.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 385

“Local authorities” means the legislative body of every county or municipality having authority to adopt local police regulations.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: “Local authorities” means the legislative body of every county or municipality having authority to adopt local police regulations.
